activities_projects.title: Character Sketch – Madam
activities_projects.objective: Understand the personality and aspirations of Madam.
steps: List 5 qualities of Madam from the story
Give one example from the text supporting each quality
Write a short character sketch
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will analyze character traits with textual evidence.
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of traits, examples, and clarity of writing

activities_projects.title: Sequence the Story
activities_projects.objective: Recall and organize events in the story.
steps: List the main events in the order they occurred
Write a brief description for each event
Read aloud the sequence in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will understand story structure and event sequencing.

activities_projects.title: Diary Entry – First Bus Ride
steps: Imagine you are Madam during her first bus ride
Write a diary entry describing your experience and emotions
Include details of sights, people, and feelings
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop creative writing and empathy skills.
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, emotional depth, and relevance to the story

activities_projects.title: New Vocabulary List
steps: Select 10 new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence related to the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will improve vocabulary and sentence construction.

activities_projects.title: Feelings Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand Madam’s emotions throughout the bus ride.
steps: Identify 5 key emotions Madam experienced (e.g., excitement, fear, curiosity)
Write the corresponding event for each emotion
Share findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will analyze character emotions and relate to experiences.

activities_projects.title: Role Play – Bus Ride Scene
steps: Assign roles (Madam, passengers, conductor)
Act out the bus ride scene from the story
Express emotions clearly during enactment
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will improve empathy, teamwork, and expression.

activities_projects.title: Comparison with Real Life Bus Ride
activities_projects.objective: Connect story experience with personal life.
steps: Recall your own first bus ride experience
Write similarities and differences compared to Madam’s experience
Share in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will relate literature to real-life experiences.

activities_projects.title: Illustration Activity
steps: Draw a scene showing Madam’s bus ride
Include key details mentioned in the story
Label characters and objects
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will develop visualization and creative skills.

activities_projects.title: Question-Answer Exercise
steps: Write 5 questions about Madam’s actions and thoughts
Answer them in 2–3 sentences each
Discuss answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will strengthen comprehension and analytical skills.

activities_projects.title: Moral Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Identify the lesson or moral of the story.
steps: Write what you think is the main lesson of Madam’s adventure
Explain why it is important
Give a personal example if possible
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students will understand story’s message and relate it to personal experiences.
